Errors while composing </InconsistentPropertyType>

The property </InconsistentPropertyType.x> has inconsistent spec types.  The defining spec is @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInconsistentProperties_root/usda/root.usd@</InconsistentPropertyType.x> and is an attribute spec.  The conflicting spec is @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInconsistentProperties_root/usda/ref.usd@</InconsistentPropType.x> and is a relationship spec.  The conflicting spec will be ignored.
The property </InconsistentPropertyType.x> has inconsistent spec types.  The defining spec is @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInconsistentProperties_root/usda/root.usd@</InconsistentPropertyType.x> and is an attribute spec.  The conflicting spec is @composition/tests/assets/ErrorInconsistentProperties_root/usda/ref.usd@</InconsistentPropType.x> and is a relationship spec.  The conflicting spec will be ignored.
